Simple Process

How OnCorner works

From posting a request to getting the job done — everything happens inside the app.

1

Post your request

Describe what you need, when, and where. Add photos. Takes less than 2 minutes.

2

Receive estimates

Local providers send their best price. Chat, ask questions, negotiate — all inside the app.

3

Choose & get it done

Pick the provider you trust. They show up, do the work, you leave a review. Done.

Trusted. Local. OnCorner.
Maria (Customer)

I need my lawn mowed and trimmed. About 1/4 acre in Algonquin, IL.

Luis L (Provider)

Hi Maria! I can do that tomorrow morning. Here's my estimate:

Luis L · Lawn & Yard

★ 4.8 · 47 reviews

$85

Why us

Built differently

We built OnCorner after seeing how other platforms treat providers. We decided to do it right.

Fair to Providers

Other platforms take 25–40%. We charge a flat monthly fee and a small commission. Providers keep more of what they earn.

100% Transparent

No hidden fees. No surprises. Providers know exactly what they pay. Customers always know what they'll be charged.

Truly Local

Built for Chicago and suburbs. Not a national app trying to fit every city — a neighborhood marketplace that knows the area.

Negotiate Freely

Chat with providers before committing. All communication stays inside the app — safe and protected for both sides.

Two-Way Reviews

Both customers and providers review each other. Accountability on both sides builds a community of real trust.

AI-Powered

AI helps write better requests, suggests fair prices, and assists providers in crafting professional estimates.

Ready to get started?
It's free to join.

Customers always free. Providers get 30 days free — no credit card required.
